title: heliotropium subracemosum
intro: Heliotropium subracemosum, also known as dwarf heliotrope, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to inhibit inflammation and reduce oxidative stress, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Heliotropium subracemosum include its potential to help manage diabetes, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to alleviate symptoms associated with these conditions.
